chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3053 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.1 2. For order on Misc. No.13492/2022 (Exemption) 3. For order on Misc. No.13493/2022 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case 08.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. It has never been fixed for hearing and pursued in the last three years by learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It is quite clear that the petitioner has no serious interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
